## Meeting Purpose

[Discuss legal matters, new hire onboarding, and personal updates between Marcel and Isabella.](https://fathom.video/share/SnZXhqo7Y8sy8-Y-DxX7B4_CqrVB1sYq?tab=summary&timestamp=1.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Isabella recommends moving forward with the attorney for legal services, estimating 20-25K for deferred investment or 5-6K for SAFE round fees](https://fathom.video/share/SnZXhqo7Y8sy8-Y-DxX7B4_CqrVB1sYq?tab=summary&timestamp=212.0)
  - [Marcel agrees to proceed, requesting a scope of work to initiate the contract process](https://fathom.video/share/SnZXhqo7Y8sy8-Y-DxX7B4_CqrVB1sYq?tab=summary&timestamp=293.0)
  - [Key priorities: company conversion before year-end, preparing for SAFE round in January, and addressing equity plans](https://fathom.video/share/SnZXhqo7Y8sy8-Y-DxX7B4_CqrVB1sYq?tab=summary&timestamp=516.0)
  - [New hire (unnamed) has started, with Alice assisting in training; energy level good but quiet](https://fathom.video/share/SnZXhqo7Y8sy8-Y-DxX7B4_CqrVB1sYq?tab=summary&timestamp=745.0)

## Topics

### Personal Update: Isabella's Pregnancy

  - [Isabella scheduled for C-section on due date (2024-11-20) due to baby's large size (10 lbs)](https://fathom.video/share/SnZXhqo7Y8sy8-Y-DxX7B4_CqrVB1sYq?tab=summary&timestamp=19.0)
  - [Natural birth deemed too risky, with potential complications for both mother and child](https://fathom.video/share/SnZXhqo7Y8sy8-Y-DxX7B4_CqrVB1sYq?tab=summary&timestamp=41.0)
  - [Decision made to prioritize safety and reduce stress](https://fathom.video/share/SnZXhqo7Y8sy8-Y-DxX7B4_CqrVB1sYq?tab=summary&timestamp=83.0)

### Legal Matters and Attorney Selection

  - [Attorney impressed with Marcel, understanding the business needs](https://fathom.video/share/SnZXhqo7Y8sy8-Y-DxX7B4_CqrVB1sYq?tab=summary&timestamp=269.0)
  - [Prefers transparent pricing: will disclose costs upfront for each task](https://fathom.video/share/SnZXhqo7Y8sy8-Y-DxX7B4_CqrVB1sYq?tab=summary&timestamp=280.0)
  - [Estimated costs:](https://fathom.video/share/SnZXhqo7Y8sy8-Y-DxX7B4_CqrVB1sYq?tab=summary&timestamp=342.0)
      - [20-25K for deferred investment scenario](https://fathom.video/share/SnZXhqo7Y8sy8-Y-DxX7B4_CqrVB1sYq?tab=summary&timestamp=324.0)
      - [5-6K for SAFE round fees (1-2 years of work)](https://fathom.video/share/SnZXhqo7Y8sy8-Y-DxX7B4_CqrVB1sYq?tab=summary&timestamp=342.0)
      - [3K for setting up options plan](https://fathom.video/share/SnZXhqo7Y8sy8-Y-DxX7B4_CqrVB1sYq?tab=summary&timestamp=624.0)
      - [\~2K/year for ongoing equity management (409A, board approvals, etc.)](https://fathom.video/share/SnZXhqo7Y8sy8-Y-DxX7B4_CqrVB1sYq?tab=summary&timestamp=638.0)
  - [Recommended approach: specific scope of work contract with cost estimates, rather than general retainer](https://fathom.video/share/SnZXhqo7Y8sy8-Y-DxX7B4_CqrVB1sYq?tab=summary&timestamp=495.0)

### Company Structure and Conversion

  - [Marcel leaning towards C Corp structure, anticipating potential VC involvement](https://fathom.video/share/SnZXhqo7Y8sy8-Y-DxX7B4_CqrVB1sYq?tab=summary&timestamp=371.0)
  - [Attorney to discuss further to confirm C Corp is the right choice](https://fathom.video/share/SnZXhqo7Y8sy8-Y-DxX7B4_CqrVB1sYq?tab=summary&timestamp=396.0)
  - [Priority: Convert before year-end if necessary](https://fathom.video/share/SnZXhqo7Y8sy8-Y-DxX7B4_CqrVB1sYq?tab=summary&timestamp=516.0)

### Equity Plans and SAFE Round

  - [Company potentially "too valuable" for simple equity issuance; options plan likely necessary](https://fathom.video/share/SnZXhqo7Y8sy8-Y-DxX7B4_CqrVB1sYq?tab=summary&timestamp=600.0)
  - [Daniel identified as priority for equity issuance post-conversion](https://fathom.video/share/SnZXhqo7Y8sy8-Y-DxX7B4_CqrVB1sYq?tab=summary&timestamp=559.0)
  - [Plan to raise SAFE round in January, address wider equity distribution after raising](https://fathom.video/share/SnZXhqo7Y8sy8-Y-DxX7B4_CqrVB1sYq?tab=summary&timestamp=540.0)

### New Hire Onboarding

  - [New employee (name pronunciation unclear, possibly "Watts") started recently](https://fathom.video/share/SnZXhqo7Y8sy8-Y-DxX7B4_CqrVB1sYq?tab=summary&timestamp=724.0)
  - [Alice involved in training, came across as intense initially](https://fathom.video/share/SnZXhqo7Y8sy8-Y-DxX7B4_CqrVB1sYq?tab=summary&timestamp=749.0)
  - [New hire described as quiet but with good energy](https://fathom.video/share/SnZXhqo7Y8sy8-Y-DxX7B4_CqrVB1sYq?tab=summary&timestamp=745.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Marcel to draft detailed scope of work with timelines for legal tasks](https://fathom.video/share/SnZXhqo7Y8sy8-Y-DxX7B4_CqrVB1sYq?tab=summary&timestamp=516.0)
  - [Send scope of work to Isabella and attorney for review and feasibility check](https://fathom.video/share/SnZXhqo7Y8sy8-Y-DxX7B4_CqrVB1sYq?tab=summary&timestamp=418.0)
  - [Marcel to clarify equity plan objectives with attorney](https://fathom.video/share/SnZXhqo7Y8sy8-Y-DxX7B4_CqrVB1sYq?tab=summary&timestamp=600.0)
  - [Proceed with company conversion process before year-end](https://fathom.video/share/SnZXhqo7Y8sy8-Y-DxX7B4_CqrVB1sYq?tab=summary&timestamp=516.0)
  - [Prepare for SAFE round in January](https://fathom.video/share/SnZXhqo7Y8sy8-Y-DxX7B4_CqrVB1sYq?tab=summary&timestamp=540.0)
  - [Continue onboarding and training of new hire](https://fathom.video/share/SnZXhqo7Y8sy8-Y-DxX7B4_CqrVB1sYq?tab=summary&timestamp=745.0)
  - [Marcel to follow up on correct pronunciation of new hire's name](https://fathom.video/share/SnZXhqo7Y8sy8-Y-DxX7B4_CqrVB1sYq?tab=summary&timestamp=720.0)
